# seerr_user_watchlist_settings (Data Source)

Read Seerr user watchlist sync settings via /api/v1/user/{userId}/settings/watchlist.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "seerr_user_watchlist_settings" "user_1" {
  user_id = 1
}

output "user_1_watchlist_sync_movies" {
  value = data.seerr_user_watchlist_settings.user_1.watchlist_sync_movies
}
```



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `user_id` (Number) The numeric ID of the user to look up.

### Read-Only

- `response_json` (String) Raw JSON response body.
- `status_code` (Number) HTTP status code.
- `watchlist_sync_movies` (Boolean) Whether movies are synced from the user's Plex watchlist.
- `watchlist_sync_tv` (Boolean) Whether TV shows are synced from the user's Plex watchlist.
